Name: M 70 – EXECUTIVE CAPITAL BUDGET FOR FY'27 AND CAPITAL PROGRAM FOR THE ENSUING THREE YEARS, AS MODIFIED (RESOLUTION B).
Title: RESOLUTION BY THE NEW YORK CITY COUNCIL PURSUANT TO SECTION 254 OF THE NEW YORK CITY CHARTER, THAT THE CAPITAL BUDGET FOR FISCAL YEAR 2027 AND CAPITAL PROGRAM FOR THE ENSUING THREE YEARS, AS SET FORTH IN THE EXECUTIVE CAPITAL BUDGET FOR THE FISCAL YEAR 2027 AND CAPITAL PROGRAM AS SUBMITTED BY THE MAYOR AS AUGMENTED BY THE BOROUGH PRESIDENTS PURSUANT TO SECTION 249 OF THE NEW YORK CITY CHARTER, AND AMENDED BY THE SCHEDULE OF CHANGES APPROVED UNDER RESOLUTION A, INCLUDING AMOUNTS REALLOCATED BY THE RESCINDMENT OF AMOUNTS FROM PRIOR CAPITAL BUDGET APPROPRIATIONS, IS HEREBY ADOPTED IN THE TOTAL AMOUNTS AS FOLLOWS (RESOLUTION B)

History.Description: This Resolution was Introduced by Council

History.Action: Hearing on P-C Item by Comm
History.Description: This Resolution was Hearing on P-C Item by Comm
A motion was made that this Resolution be P-C Item Approved by Comm approved by Roll Call.

Attachments.Name: Fiscal Year 2027 Changes To the Executive Capital Budget Adopted by the City Council
Supporting Detail for Fiscal Year 2027 Changes to the Executive Capital Budget Adopted by the City Council Pursuant to Section 254 of the City Charter

Text: RESOLVED, By the Council of the City of New York, pursuant to Section 254 of the New York City Charter, that the Capital Budget for the Fiscal Year 2027 and Capital Program for the ensuing three years, as set forth in the Executive Capital Budget for Fiscal Year 2027 and Capital Program as submitted by the Mayor as augmented by the Borough Presidents pursuant to Section 249 of the New York City Charter, and amended by the schedule of changes approved under Resolution A, including amounts reallocated by the rescindment of amounts from prior Capital Budget appropriations, is hereby adopted in the total amounts as follows (Resolution B).

\b RESOLVED\b0 , By the Council of the City of New York, pursuant to Section 254 of the New York City Charter, that the Capital Budget for the Fiscal Year 2027\b  \b0 and Capital Program for the ensuing three years, as set forth in the Executive Capital Budget for Fiscal Year 2027 and Capital Program as submitted by the Mayor as augmented by the Borough Presidents pursuant to Section 249 of the New York City Charter, and amended by the schedule of changes approved under Resolution A, including amounts reallocated by the rescindment of amounts from prior Capital Budget appropriations, is hereby adopted in the total amounts as follows (Resolution B).\par
